sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3626" key="a)/kroptuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄκρο-πτυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">χος</itype>, perh. <sense id="n3626.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cloth, napkin</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Facet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
